column.name: BUTXT
column.description: Name of Company Code or Company

column.name: WAABW
column.description: Maximum exchange rate deviation in percent

column.name: TXJCD
column.description: Jurisdiction for tax calculation - tax jurisdiction code

column.name: FMHRDATE
column.description: Funds center can be assigned to an account in HR from

column.name: FDBUK
column.description: Cash Management and Forecast Company Code

column.name: XVALV
column.description: Indicator: Propose current date as value date ?

column.name: XSKFN
column.description: Indicator: Discount base amount is the net value

column.name: XMWSN
column.description: Indicator: Base amount for tax is net of discount ?

column.name: MREGL
column.description: Rules for Copying from the Sample Account for G/L Accounts

column.name: XGSBE
column.description: Indicator: Business area financial statements required?

column.name: XKDFT
column.description: Indicator: Post translations for exchange rate differences ?

column.name: XEINK
column.description: Indicator: Purchase Account Processing is Active

column.name: XSLTA
column.description: Indicator: No ex.rate difference when clearing in local crcy

column.name: XFDMM
column.description: Indicator: Updating MM in Cash Mgmt/Forecast activated?

column.name: XFDSD
column.description: Indicator: Updating SD in Cash Mgmt/Forecast activated?

column.name: XEXTB
column.description: Indicator: Company code is in another system

column.name: EBUKR
column.description: Original Key of the Company Code

column.name: KTOP2
column.description: Chart of Accounts According to Country Legislation

column.name: TXKRS
column.description: Foreign Currency Translation for Tax Items

column.name: XBBBF
column.description: G/L account authorization check in inventory management

column.name: XBBBE
column.description: G/L account authorization check in PO/scheduling agreement

column.name: XBBBA
column.description: G/L account authorization check in purchase requisitions

column.name: XBBKO
column.description: G/L account authorization check in contracts

column.name: XSTDT
column.description: Indicator: Document Date As the Basis for Tax Determination

column.name: MWSKV
column.description: Input Tax Code for Non-Taxable Transactions

column.name: MWSKA
column.description: Output Tax Code for Non-Taxable Transactions

column.name: IMPDA
column.description: Foreign Trade: Import Data Control in MM Purchase Orders

column.name: XKKBI
column.description: Indicator: Can credit control area be overwritten?

column.name: PP_PDATE
column.description: Procedure for Setting the Posting Date

column.name: KOPIM
column.description: Foreign trade: Import data copying control for GR

column.name: DKWEG
column.description: Foreign Trade: Screen ctrl of imp.data f. MM-goods rececipt

column.name: BAPOVAR
column.description: Additional settings variant for bus.area financial statemnts

column.name: DTPROV
column.description: Document Type for Provisions for Taxes on Services Received

column.name: DTAMTC
column.description: Document Type for Journal Voucher (Amount Correction)

column.name: DTTAXC
column.description: Document Type for Journal Voucher (Tax Code Correction)

column.name: XVATDATE
column.description: Tax Reporting Date Active in Documents

column.name: PST_PER_VAR
column.description: Manage Variant of Posting Period for Company Code/Ledger

column.name: XBBSC
column.description: G/L account authorization check in shopping cart

column.name: FM_DERIVE_ACC
column.description: Activate Account Assignment Derivation in Funds Management
